text:
Market today: The tech/chip sector is still the driver, but headlines suggest broader market crosswinds with trade policy shifts and institutional moves into private markets. My kind of names are sensitive to both.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL (-37.71%) due to its leveraged decay and current status. SPAL is also a SELL (-48.51%) for similar reasons. QQQI is TRIM (-2.09%) as an income anchor.

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA and AMD from the scanner list. They are showing strong technical setups in discount zones.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for technical setups in key chip names.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged position due to its significant loss and decay.
SPAL: Similar to SOXL, this leveraged ETF is a SELL candidate given its large loss.
NVDA: Watch for entry near 206.47-206.24 with a stop at 205.57, if the setup confirms.
